payload.text: 开发一个合同管理系统，需要登录、用户管理、合同管理，合同附件类型包括pdf、word

acceptance.auto: pytest全通过(登录/用户/合同/附件/权限)
acceptance.evidence: 测试输出、截图、控制台日志
acceptance.manual: 公网浏览器: 登录->合同列表->创建合同->上传附件->下载->权限切换

entities.fields: id, username, password_hash, display_name, email, role(admin/manager/viewer), status(active/disabled), created_at, updated_at
entities.name: User

entities.fields: id, contract_no, title, party_a, party_b, amount, status(draft/pending/signed/terminated/expired), sign_date, start_date, end_date, description, created_by(FK->User), created_at, updated_at
entities.name: Contract

entities.fields: id, contract_id(FK->Contract), filename, original_name, file_type(pdf/word), file_size, storage_path, uploaded_by(FK->User), uploaded_at
entities.name: Attachment

entities.fields: id, user_id(FK->User), action, entity_type, entity_id, detail, created_at
entities.name: AuditLog

business_model.permissions: admin: 全部权限; manager: 合同CRUD+附件; viewer: 只读
business_model.relationships: User 1:N Contract, Contract 1:N Attachment, User 1:N AuditLog
business_model.state_machine: Contract: draft -> pending -> signed -> terminated | expired

data_constraints.demo_only: 仅演示账号和假数据，不得输入真实合同或个人信息
data_constraints.public_repo: 公开仓库不含密码/密钥/token

deliverables.database: SQLite + schema初始化 + 种子数据(3演示账号)
deliverables.frontend: Jinja2 服务端模板 + 静态CSS/JS
deliverables.tests: pytest: 登录认证、用户CRUD、合同CRUD+状态流转、附件上传下载+类型校验

product_flows: 登录: username+password -> JWT, 演示账号预置
用户管理: admin CRUD用户、分配角色、启禁用
合同管理: CRUD合同、状态流转、列表筛选搜索
附件管理: 上传(pdf/word校验扩展名+magic bytes)、下载、删除
异常: 未登录重定向、无权限403、文件类型不符拒绝、合同不存在404
审计: 关键操作记录日志(创建/修改/删除合同、上传附件)

tech_defaults.auth: JWT, 演示账号 admin/admin123 manager/manager123 viewer/viewer123
